round_focus_map.1: Taxonomy claim strength: new genus + putative new family. VICTOR/OPTSIL caveat (EL-001/DEC-D017), ViPTree S_G=0.073 single-anchor, vConTACT3 few-protein-link, single-relative (HJ05) basis, whether 'putative new family' is over/under-claimed for ICTV Caudoviricetes.
round_focus_map.2: Putative AMG interpretation (thyA/nrdD/DAHP-synthase shikimate): is the down-toned framing defensible? Foldseek fident=0.38 strength, host-contamination/assembly artifact risk, over-interpretation, AMG definition rigor.
round_focus_map.3: In vivo + statistics design: single log-rank comparison only, biosafety (phage-only 100%) not powered, histopathology descriptive, single 48h in-vitro endpoint, n/group, LD50 Kaerber, pseudoreplication. Is the added limitations sentence sufficient?
round_focus_map.4: Novelty vs prior Aeromonas-phage / aquaculture phage-therapy literature: is the contribution incremental? What comparable Aeromonas phage therapy fish studies exist? Reviewer-blocker overclaims, Results-Discussion coupling, meta-review.
